exploration_notes: Searched both locally and via Sourcegraph for DialTimeout across kubernetes/kubernetes (apiserver) and etcd-io/etcd (client/ and server/). For kubernetes, found 2 production files: etcd3.go defines the dialTimeout constant (20s) and configures it in clientv3.Config, while preflight/checks.go uses net.DialTimeout for connectivity checks. For etcd client/, found 7 files: config.go defines the DialTimeout struct field, client.go uses it for connection timeouts, lease.go and maintenance.go reference
